data.title: Agent Kudos System: Process-reward tracking for quality-seeking behaviors
data.description:
Replace restriction-based constraints with process-based rewards that shift agent motivation from gate-evasion to quality-seeking. Award kudos points for 14 structurally-verifiable quality behaviors. Grounded in Process Reward Model research (step-level recognition, dense feedback, competence framing). Hardened against Goodhart's Law through mechanical verifiability and session-scope anti-gaming invariant.

IN SCOPE: .kudos/ JSONL ledger, 14 trigger definitions with mechanical verification, Goodhart resistance mechanisms, agent awareness (CLAUDE.md + using-lockpick + 3 sub-agent definitions), tool-use hook blocking direct .kudos/ edits, workflow-phase sub-caps, CI snapshot at worktree creation, dso commit-validate script, running total with Contributor rank.

OUT OF SCOPE: Reward delivery mechanisms (deferred). User-awarded points (separate placeholder epic).

TRIGGER GROUPS:
Group A (Detection/Ownership): (1) proactive bug catch, (2) pre-existing failure ownership, (3) 5/5 review dimension implementer award, (4) eliminate 3+ duplicate code instances.
Group B (Quality Canon, craft standards for implementation sub-agents): (5) extract long function, (6) replace magic literal with named constant, (7) reduce nesting via guard clauses, (9) add characterization test before change, (10) break hard dependency via DI, (11) eliminate pass-through method, (12) delete commented-out code, (13) reduce parameter count.
Group C (Persistence): (14) review re-engagement after findings, (15) test gate persistence after block.

KEY DESIGN DECISIONS:
- Session-scope anti-gaming invariant: problematic artifact must predate session branch creation
- CI snapshot anchor at worktree creation (tamper-resistant pre-existing failure detection)
- dso commit-validate keyword/pattern evaluation at commit time (not hook hot-path)
- Award(n) = BasePoints x (1/n) x jitter(0.8-1.2); hard session ceiling
- Deduplication key: (trigger_id, diff_hash) not ticket ID
- Option 3 for sub-agents: framing-only (craft standards), no point accumulation
- All AST-dependent checks gracefully skip (exit 2) when sg absent
- Contributor rank: Contributor / Consistent / Distinguished / Exemplary / Principal
- Trigger 14 fires per resubmission after findings (not on final resolution)
- Trigger 15 uses commit_workflow events from .review-events/ JSONL (no record-test-status.sh history needed)

SUB-AGENT FRAMING TARGETS (direct edits to .md files):
- completion-verifier.md: add UNCERTAIN verdict + sprint orchestrator routing
- approach-decision-maker.md: architect/steward framing for counter-proposal authority
- doc-writer.md: new-contributor audience + maintenance cost framing

FILES CREATED: .kudos/ ledger, plugins/dso/scripts/commit-validate.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/kudos-snapshot.sh, plugins/dso/hooks/tools/kudos-write-guard.sh
